pr.title: Add minimal PWA manifest and install metadata
pr.body:
This updates the site to support “Add to Home Screen” / install prompts without introducing a service worker or offline behavior. The change is intentionally limited to manifest and document metadata, reusing assets already present in `/public`.

- **Manifest**
  - Added `public/manifest.webmanifest` with the app name, short name, description, standalone display mode, start URL, and brand colors.
  - Reused existing public assets for icons:
    - `/favicon.ico`
    - `/placeholder.svg`

- **Installability meta**
  - Updated `index.html` to point at the manifest and local icons.
  - Added minimal install-related meta for mobile/PWA surfaces:
    - `theme-color`
    - `application-name`
    - `mobile-web-app-capable`
    - `apple-mobile-web-app-capable`
    - `apple-mobile-web-app-title`
    - `apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style`

- **Follow-up for production icons**
  - Documented the remaining gap in `docs/pending-tasks.md`: dedicated `192x192` and `512x512` PWA icons are still needed to replace the current fallback assets.

```html
<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.webmanifest" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#D97706" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Nomaderia" />
```
pr.author: Copilot
